title: Tour Guide Explanation 导游讲解
scene: 导游带领游客参观长城，讲解历史。

lines.en: Welcome to the Great Wall, everyone! Please follow me.
lines.zh: 欢迎大家来到长城！请跟我来。

lines.en: It's so magnificent! How old is the Great Wall?
lines.zh: 太壮观了！长城有多少年历史了？

lines.en: It has a history of over two thousand years.
That's amazing! Why was it built?
lines.zh: 太了不起了！为什么要建长城？

lines.en: It was built to protect the country from enemies in ancient times.
lines.zh: 在古代，它是为了保护国家免受敌人入侵而建的。

lines.en: How long is the Great Wall?
It's over twenty thousand kilometers long. It's the longest wall in the world.
lines.zh: 全长超过两万公里。是世界上最长的墙。

lines.en: Incredible! How many steps are there to the top?
lines.zh: 难以置信！到顶部有多少级台阶？

lines.en: About one thousand steps. Take your time and enjoy the view!
lines.zh: 大约一千级。慢慢走，欣赏风景！

lines.en: Thank you! I can't wait to climb to the top!
lines.zh: 谢谢！我迫不及待想爬到顶了！
